items.title_en: Palantir shares have struggled this year. D.A. Davidson says buy the dip
items.title_zh: Palantir 股价今年表现不佳。 DA戴维森表示逢低买入
items.desc_en: Analyst Gil Luria upgraded the AI and defense software stock to buy from neutral.
items.desc_zh: 分析师 Gil Luria 将人工智能和国防软件股票的评级从“中立”上调至“买入”。

items.title_en: Russia’s neighbor Lithuania scraps constitutional ban on nuclear weapons. Here's why
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯的邻国立陶宛废除了核武器宪法禁令。这就是为什么
items.desc_en: The decision comes shortly after lawmakers in Finland voted to lift its longstanding ban on nuclear weapons.
items.desc_zh: 这一决定是在芬兰立法者投票解除其长期的核武器禁令后不久作出的。

items.title_en: Americans are paying record prices for steak. Here's why demand isn't cracking
items.title_zh: 美国人正在为牛排支付创纪录的价格。这就是需求没有增长的原因
items.desc_en: Despite record beef prices, Americans aren't giving up steak. Consumers are treating beef as an affordable luxury and prioritizing it for special occasions.
items.desc_zh: 尽管牛肉价格创历史新高，美国人并没有放弃牛排。消费者将牛肉视为一种负担得起的奢侈品，并在特殊场合优先考虑它。

items.title_en: SpaceX may emerge as ultimate blueprint for new wave of mega-cap IPOs
items.title_zh: SpaceX可能成为新一波大型IPO的最终蓝图
items.desc_en: "It would not surprise me at all to see a similar dynamic play out with some of these [IPOs] set to come in the months ahead," the Kathmere Capital CIO says.
items.desc_zh: Kathmere Capital 首席信息官表示：“如果在未来几个月内看到其中一些 [IPO] 出现类似的动态，我一点也不感到惊讶。”

items.title_en: Restrictive immigration policies are changing the composition of the healthcare workforce
items.title_zh: 限制性移民政策正在改变医疗保健劳动力的构成
items.desc_en: CNBC’s Sharon Epperson reports on how restrictive immigration policies affect the healthcare workforce.
items.desc_zh: CNBC 的 Sharon Epperson 报道了限制性移民政策如何影响医疗保健劳动力。

items.desc_zh: Vlad Tenev 在接受 CNBC 采访时谈到了人工智能代理在交易中的潜力。

items.title_en: World Cup could boost the June jobs report by 40,000, Goldman estimates
items.title_zh: 高盛估计，世界杯可能会使 6 月就业报告增加 4 万人
items.desc_en: Nonfarm payrolls are projected to post a gain of 115,000, according to the Dow Jones consensus.
items.desc_zh: 根据道琼斯共识，非农就业人数预计将增长 115,000 人。

items.title_en: EU border delays 'not bearable' over summer, warns airport boss
items.title_zh: 机场老板警告称，夏季欧盟边境延误“难以忍受”
items.desc_en: Holidaymakers face long waits under the EU's new Entry-Exit System, the head of Berlin's airport says.
items.desc_zh: 柏林机场负责人表示，在欧盟新的出入境系统下，度假者面临漫长的等待。

items.title_en: Nvidia offers start-up customers chance to swap compute power for revenue share
items.title_zh: Nvidia 为初创客户提供以计算能力换取收入分成的机会
items.desc_en: Nvidia says it will give start-ups the chance to swap access to compute power for a slice of future profits under a new program aimed at AI-focused firms.
items.desc_zh: 英伟达表示，根据一项针对人工智能公司的新计划，它将为初创企业提供用计算能力来换取未来利润的机会。

items.title_en: Google must pay €4.1bn fine for using Android to 'block' rivals
items.title_zh: 谷歌因使用 Android“阻止”竞争对手而须支付 41 亿欧元罚款
items.desc_en: A Google spokesperson said the judgement "fails to recognise" the firm's "significant investment to ensure Android remains open."
items.desc_zh: 谷歌发言人表示，该判决“未能认可”该公司“为确保 Android 保持开放而进行的重大投资”。

items.title_zh: 中国称飞行员出于“个人原因”将小型飞机撞向摩天大楼
items.desc_en: The 66-year-old, who died in the crash, had anxiety and referenced "ending his life" in his diary.
items.desc_zh: 这位在车祸中丧生的 66 岁老人感到焦虑，并在日记中提到“结束生命”。

items.title_zh: 美国不会续签USMCA，为与加拿大和墨西哥的谈判打开大门

items.desc_zh: 该公司表示，未来的游戏仍将在商店出售，但它们只会附带数字代码。

items.title_en: Ford rehires human engineers after AI fails to match quality checks
items.title_zh: 人工智能未能匹配质量检查后，福特重新雇用人类工程师
